claim_boundary: Unified symbolic construction only. Coefficients and the physical scale remain symbolic/provisional where not derived; no frozen prediction, gauge coupling, Wilson coefficient, rare-B prediction, or full BHSM completion is promoted.

interactions.missing_for_physical_closure: charged-current normalization, orientation, and action coefficient
neutral response normalization and physical scale

interactions.source_term: projector-constrained D_BH(h,A,P) and interaction source terms

interactions.missing_for_physical_closure: absolute current normalization and CKM coefficient value/exponent
interactions.source_term: P_gen and CKM/transport-labeled charged current source

interactions.missing_for_physical_closure: intermediate response kernel and induced-effective-action theorem
interactions.source_term: second variation or integration-out of charged/neutral sources

interactions.missing_for_physical_closure: domain, zero-mode projection, and scale normalization
interactions.source_term: Schur complement of quadratic block Hessian
